purpose: Defines ownership and enforcement rules for owner-facing runtime language and canonical machine-artifact language.

criteria.warn_logic: Only legacy artifacts are non-English and classified.
criteria.block_logic: New canonical artifact contains non-English text.
criteria.remediation_path: Rewrite offending canonical artifacts to English and rerun scanner.

criteria.pass_logic: Runtime owner-facing Russian exists only through Officio runtime lane.
criteria.warn_logic: Legacy runtime RU files remain and are explicitly marked runtime-only.
criteria.block_logic: Russian prose is stored in machine policy/contracts/schemas.
criteria.remediation_path: Move RU prose to owner-facing runtime output file and keep machine files English.

criteria.pass_logic: Localized content exists only under explicit localization folders.
criteria.warn_logic: Localization metadata is present but partial.
criteria.block_logic: Localized text appears outside controlled localization folders.
criteria.remediation_path: Move localized resources under controlled localization markers.

next_action: Adopt matrix in filter gate and include in Officio read-first route.
